posts.text:
Here's #SCOTUS summarily reversing the three-judge district court's ruling in the Texas redistricting case *because* of its "interim" grant of emergency relief back in December.

That's not surprising, of course. But it's yet another data point for why calling it the "interim" docket is misleading.

SCOTUS summarily reverses the lower court order striking down TX’s Republican gerrymander that SCOTUS let go into effect back in December on the shadow docket. 

IOW, SCOTUS reversed a case on the merits with no reasoning other than saying they were bound by two paragraphs on the shadow docket.

posts.text: Clearly his plan is for the FBI to somehow take control over The Atlantic so he can settle the lawsuit with himself and rob the people who are suing him like trump is doing with the IRS.

reply_context.text:
kash about to find out the reason trump has had success with this tactic is that everyone he does it to finds settlements a really easy way to bribe him

nobody's got any reason to bribe a failed podcaster who will soon be out of a job

posts.text: I have a friend who is an incredibly talented elementary/middle school teacher. The passion and intensity and goofiness that make him the most well-liked teacher at every school he's worked at are the same qualities that make it hard for him to hold on to a gf and have kids of his own.

reply_context.text: Her follow-up is mental. You can’t be a male kindergarten teacher?

posts.text:
I hadn't heard of this game before that thread. I think what's happening is... uh... a whole bunch of stuff, none of which is good.

claude.ai/share/a3d674...

knowyourmeme.com/memes/events...

reply_context.text: what's happening is x dot com

posts.text: Imagine how hard it must be to be a male educator in a world where people like this aren't instantly shunned.

reply_context.text: what the fuck is happening

posts.text: x is objectively worse than 4chan. 4chan is at least a free-for-all. the x platform goes out of its way to amplify garbage, and even provides tools for its users to manufacture csam.

reply_context.text: yeah, that’s right, albeit with caveat that i think x is worse than 4chan. you take the atmosphere of a particularly nasty 4chan subboard and then scale it up to a website where heads of state and ceos of leading corps all post

posts.text: Maybe something like this?

reply_context.text: Everyone can have a penthouse? How did this guy ever convince anyone he’s smart? He’s always been a good conman though, I’ll give him that.

posts.text: Next administration, very first thing: pass an executive order recognizing the jurisdiction of the ICC and functionally repealing the ASPA (i.e. advising DHS and DOD to not enforce it and communicating to The Hague that it's open season on American corruption).
